case_title: CACH, LLC VS. FERNANDO GALO ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALO, FERNANDO , AN INDIVIDUAL $2,194.01 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,435.01, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
